programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Today, Kevin and Toli sit down with a new batch of business owners looking to grow and thrive. This first business owner is the heart of America personified. Mark Baylis founded Valor for struggling veterans around America and now it’s time for the A-team to help him scale his mission to reach more patriots in need. From there, the team touch base with a rough and tumble businessman who brings bespoke adventure experiences to life. After that, the pioneers of STAYCA VACA bring their niche business model to the team for evaluation. Then, Compliant Tech caps off the day with a shock to the system.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s time to break down what the A-Team has learned from our latest group of companies—and how we can best support them in reaching their goals. Today, the spotlight is on A-Team member Larry Ward of Market Rithm. This seasoned CEO has seen it all when it comes to marketing strategy—and he’s got the accolades to prove it. Now, he’s setting his sights on helping businesses gain a competitive edge in their marketing efforts. Next, we’re introduced to another powerhouse on Kevin’s team: Nate Bailey, founder of Unleash the Leader Within. Nate brings a dynamic, personalized approach to scaling businesses that have often been overlooked. Rounding out this insightful roundtable discussion are A-Team members Chandler Kline from PICMII Crowdfunding and podcaster Dr. Jason Dean, each contributing their own unique areas of expertise.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: This week, host Laura visits a family who has taken backyard farming to a whole new level. The Killpatrick family led by husband and father Michael is paving the way for the next generation of regenerative farming. This farm sprouted from the 2020 pandemic and in a few short years has become a pivotal cornerstone of their city community for all things holistic and organic. The Farm on Central is proving what can be accomplished with dedication to the future of farming.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: On this episode, Laura takes a trip to White Oak Pastures in Georgia to meet with pioneer and visionary, Will Harris. After two decades of monocultural farming, Will took his multi-generation farm into a completely new direction by turning it into a regenerative farm. Through trials and tribulations, Will and his family are paving the way for regenerative agriculture and educating the public on the importance of food education.

programme.title: NatureStream.tv
programme.desc: Your TV can be a window to a world of beauty, serenity, and well being. Our relaxing nature films and art displays can transform any environment into a natural oasis. programme.title: Losing Is Worse Than Death | The Bill Tierney Documentary
programme.desc: Coach Bill Tierney is a legend. Over his five decade coaching career, he's accomplished almost everything: NCAA Championships, Coach of the Year honors, induction into the Hall of Fame. The last accomplishment left for his resume? A PLL Championship. Philadelphia finished 2-8 in Coach Tierney's inaugural year at the helm. Now in his second season, Tierney is aiming to right the ship and has his sights on one more ring.

programme.title: The Story of Brennan O’Neill
programme.desc: Brennan O’Neill’s rare combination of size, speed, and power has made him one of the most dominant forces in lacrosse. From prodigy to professional, his physical presence has reshaped the game. But as competition intensifies and defenses adjust, this feature explores how dominance is tested at the highest level, and asks one question: Is dominance enough?

Stick around until the end for a bonus interview with UAlbany head coach Scott Marr, who discusses the first annual LarGer Than Life Game celebrating the life and legacy of late Siena head coach Liam Gleason.

programme.title: S1E4 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.title: S1E5 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. programme.title: S1E1 Driven
programme.desc:
GoPro Motorsports Original Series DRIVEN takes you deep inside the world of Supercross and Motocross champion James Stewart. Ride alongside the man known as the fastest on two wheels as he shares the highs, lows, and relentless drive that shaped his legendary career.
GoPro Original Series DRIVEN also follows X Games star and snowmobile icon Chris Burandt. Join him on a thrilling journey to discover what fuels his passion and dedication to the lifestyle he has loved since childhood. This is raw, high-octane storytelling you can’t miss.

programme.title: S1E2 Driven
programme.desc: In this episode of GoPro Original Series DRIVEN, we continue our in-depth look at X Games star and snowmobile legend Chris Burandt. Join him on an adrenaline-fueled journey to uncover what drives his passion and dedication to the lifestyle he has loved since childhood. The second part goes inside the life of three-time NASCAR Cup Series Champion and Daytona 500 winner Joey Logano. Watch as he pushes the limits on the track and discovers how he uses his racing platform to make a difference in the lives of others.

programme.title: S1E3 Driven
programme.desc: Three-time NASCAR Cup Series Champion and Daytona 500 winner Joey Logano continues to push the limits on the track while finding new ways to use his racing platform to make a positive impact on others. In this episode of GoPro Motorsports Original Series DRIVEN, step into the world of DC Shoes co-founder, rally car driver, and marketing mastermind Ken Block. Strap in for an electrifying journey through the moments and passions that have fueled his remarkable career.
